processes.title: Processes
processes.subtitle: AI-powered process discovery, mapping, and documentation — grounded in SIPOC and BPMN 2.0 methodology.
processes.section1Text: Most organizations have processes that exist only in people's heads. Auditora.ai's Process module uses AI-guided conversations to elicit, document, and visualize every process in your organization — automatically generating SIPOC maps, BPMN 2.0 diagrams, and Standard Operating Procedures.
processes.feature1Text: The AI asks the right questions about suppliers, inputs, activities, outputs, and customers to build complete process documentation.
processes.feature2Text: Real BPMN 2.0 diagrams generated automatically — exportable to XML for use in any BPM tool.
processes.feature3Text: AI generates versioned Standard Operating Procedures with objectives, scope, responsible parties, and step-by-step instructions.
processes.feature4Text: Every process is documented using the SIPOC methodology with automatic coverage gap detection.
processes.ctaTitle: Map your first process in minutes

evaluations.title: Evaluations
evaluations.subtitle: AI-generated decision scenarios based on your actual process maps and identified risks. A flight simulator for your operations team.
evaluations.section1Title: Test decisions before they cost you
evaluations.section1Text: Auditora.ai's Evaluation module creates realistic operational scenarios based on your documented processes and risks. Team members face dilemmas under pressure and the system scores their decisions across alignment, risk awareness, and decision criteria.
evaluations.feature1Text: AI generates realistic decision scenarios tailored to your industry, processes, and risk profile.
evaluations.feature2Text: Decisions are evaluated across procedure alignment, risk awareness, and decision criteria quality.
evaluations.feature3Text: Compare how different team members respond to the same scenario to identify training gaps.
evaluations.feature4Text: Scenarios are generated from your actual FMEA risk assessments, making every exercise operationally relevant.
evaluations.ctaTitle: See how your team decides under pressure

about.title: About Auditora.ai
about.subtitle: We're building the future of process intelligence — making operational excellence accessible to every organization.
about.section1Text: Organizations lose millions every year to undocumented processes, hidden risks, and decisions made without context. We founded Auditora.ai to change that. By combining AI with proven methodologies like SIPOC, BPMN 2.0, and FMEA, we help teams discover, document, and continuously improve their operations.
about.section2Text: We believe the best process intelligence comes from combining human knowledge with AI capabilities. Our platform doesn't replace your team's expertise — it amplifies it by asking the right questions, identifying gaps, and generating the documentation and analysis that would take weeks to produce manually.
about.value1Text: Every feature is grounded in proven frameworks — SIPOC, BPMN 2.0, FMEA, ISO 31000.
about.value2Text: AI handles the heavy lifting so your team can focus on decisions that matter.
about.value3Text: Processes evolve. Our platform ensures your documentation and risk assessments evolve with them.

security.title: Security at Auditora.ai
security.subtitle: We take the security of your data seriously. Here's how we protect your organization's information.
security.encryptionText: All data in transit is protected with TLS 1.3 encryption. Data at rest is encrypted using AES-256 encryption. This includes all process maps, risk assessments, session transcripts, and organizational data stored on our platform.
security.encryptionKeys: Encryption keys managed by cloud provider KMS
security.infrastructureText: Auditora.ai is hosted on enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure. Our application layer runs on Railway (backed by AWS), and our database is hosted on Supabase (PostgreSQL on AWS). All infrastructure components are in SOC 2 compliant data centers.
security.infraBackups: Automated daily backups with point-in-time recovery
security.accessText: We implement strict access controls to ensure your data is only accessible to authorized users within your organization.
security.accessAudit: Audit logs for all administrative actions
security.authText: Auditora.ai uses Better Auth, a modern authentication framework, supporting multiple secure authentication methods to keep your account safe.
security.authSession: Secure session management with automatic expiry
security.complianceText: We follow SOC 2 Type II security practices across our organization. While we are actively working toward formal certification, our security controls are aligned with the Trust Services Criteria.
security.complianceCcpa: CCPA / CPRA compliant for California residents
security.residencyText: All customer data is stored in the US East region (Virginia) via our Supabase and Railway infrastructure on AWS. If you have specific data residency requirements, please contact us to discuss available options.
security.residencyIsolation: Tenant data isolation at the database level
security.incidentText: We maintain a documented incident response plan that covers identification, containment, eradication, and recovery. In the event of a security incident that affects your data, we commit to notifying affected customers within 72 hours, as required by GDPR and industry best practices.
security.disclosureText: We value the security research community and welcome responsible disclosure of vulnerabilities. If you discover a security issue, please report it to us.
security.disclosureResponse: We respond to reports within 48 hours
security.disclosureCredit: We credit researchers (with consent) for valid findings
security.disclosureNoLegal: We will not pursue legal action against good-faith researchers
security.practicesText: Security is integrated into every stage of our software development lifecycle.
security.practicesReview: Mandatory code review for all changes
security.practicesTraining: Security awareness training for all team members
security.contactText: If you have questions about our security practices or need to report a vulnerability, we're here to help.

careers.title: Careers at Auditora.ai
careers.subtitle: Join us in building the future of AI-powered process intelligence.
careers.section1Text: We're a fast-growing team passionate about making operational excellence accessible through AI. We work remotely, ship fast, and care deeply about building tools that solve real problems for organizations worldwide.
careers.perk1Text: Work from anywhere in the world. We believe great talent isn't limited by geography.
careers.perk2Text: Small teams, high ownership. Deploy to production multiple times a day.
careers.perk3Text: Your work directly helps organizations manage risk and improve operations.
careers.perk4Text: Learn from a world-class team and grow your career in AI and enterprise SaaS.
careers.noPositions: We don't have open positions right now, but we're always looking for exceptional talent.
careers.spontaneous: Send us your CV and tell us how you'd contribute to our mission.

contact.title: Contact us

faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about Auditora.ai.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions

urlLimitations.question: If it only reads my public website, how can it identify real risks?
urlLimitations.answer: The initial diagnostic identifies structural and logical risks based on industry patterns and the inferred process structure. These are well-founded hypotheses, not operational findings. The precision of the analysis increases significantly when you use the guided conversation or the full platform with actual operational context.

vsChatgpt.question: How is this different from using ChatGPT to generate processes?
vsChatgpt.answer: Auditora.ai differs in three key aspects. First, methodology: every session follows the SIPOC framework with automatic coverage gap detection. Second, deliverables: diagrams generated are real BPMN 2.0, exportable to XML, not approximate representations. Third, persistence: processes, risks, and mitigations are stored, tracked, and evolve in a structured manner.

dataAccess.question: What data do you access from my website exactly?
dataAccess.answer: The text content of up to 5 public pages is analyzed: homepage, about, services, and similar. This is the same content visible to any visitor in a browser. No internal systems, APIs, databases, or protected areas are accessed.

bpmKnowledge.question: Do I need BPM or BPMN knowledge to use the tool?
bpmKnowledge.answer: No. Auditora.ai is designed so that anyone with knowledge of their business can use it. The AI formulates relevant questions in accessible language and technical notation is generated automatically. For consultants with BPM experience, the tool accelerates the documentation process. For those without technical training, the platform manages the methodological complexity.

deepening.question: Can I go deeper than the instant report?
deepening.answer: Yes. After the initial diagnostic, you can start a guided conversation with the AI. The platform asks specific questions about operations — suppliers, inputs, activities, outputs, customers — and builds a progressively more detailed analysis. The result includes a complete FMEA with failure modes and Risk Priority Number (RPN) per activity.

dataSecurity.question: Is my data secure?
dataSecurity.answer: Yes. All information is transmitted with TLS encryption and stored encrypted at rest. Anonymous sessions expire in 24 hours. Information provided is not used to train AI models. When you create an account, data is stored in your organization's private workspace with complete isolation.

accountMigration.question: What happens to my analysis if I create an account?
accountMigration.answer: All information generated during the anonymous session — process map, risk analysis, guided conversation, and deliverables — transfers automatically to the account without data loss.

vsProcessMining.question: Is this process mining?
vsProcessMining.answer: No. Process mining analyzes system logs (ERP, CRM) to discover how processes actually execute. Auditora.ai is an elicitation-based process discovery tool: it guides structured conversations to document processes and analyze risks. These are complementary approaches. Process mining requires system data; Auditora.ai works with human knowledge.

evaluaciones.question: What are Harvard-style evaluations?
evaluaciones.answer: AI-generated decision scenarios based on your actual process maps and identified risks. Each scenario presents realistic operational dilemmas where team members make choices under pressure. The system scores their decisions across three dimensions: alignment with procedures, risk awareness, and decision criteria. Think of it as a flight simulator for operations teams.

procedures.question: Can Auditora generate standard operating procedures?
procedures.answer: Yes. Once processes are documented, AI generates versioned SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) with objectives, scope, responsible parties, step-by-step instructions, controls, and KPIs. You review and approve each version before publishing.

problem.title: Your competitors are mapping processes 8x faster
problem.statLabel: % of organizations lack documented processes for critical operations

pain1.title: Weeks lost to interviews
pain1.description: Traditional process discovery requires 3-6 weeks of interviews and multiple revision rounds before you have a usable map.

pain2.title: Diagrams that die on day one
pain2.description: Visio and PowerPoint diagrams become obsolete the moment operations change. No versioning, no traceability.

pain3.title: Risks hiding in plain sight
pain3.description: Without structured FMEA analysis, critical failure modes go undetected until they become incidents.

productFlow.title: One platform. Six capabilities. Zero fragmentation.
productFlow.subtitle: Replace spreadsheets, whiteboards, and five different tools with one AI-powered consulting workspace.

step1.title: Discover
step1.description: Scan a company website or start a guided conversation. AI generates an initial SIPOC map and risk assessment in minutes.

step2.title: Map
step2.description: Transform conversations into interactive BPMN 2.0 diagrams in real time. Compatible with Camunda, Signavio, and any BPMN tool.

step3.title: Assess
step3.description: FMEA matrix, 5×5 heat maps, risk registers with mitigations and controls — automated, not spreadsheet-driven.

step4.title: Document
step4.description: Generate versioned SOPs from your process documentation. AI writes the procedures, you review and approve.

step5.title: Simulate
step5.description: Test your team's decision-making with AI-generated Harvard-style scenarios based on your actual processes and risks.

step6.title: Evaluate
step6.description: Measure human risk across your organization with scored evaluations, strength/risk area analysis, and team-wide dashboards.

evaluacion.title: Test your team before a crisis tests them
evaluacion.subtitle: AI generates decision scenarios from your actual BPMN processes and identified risks. Your people make decisions under pressure. You measure their readiness.
evaluacion.exampleQuestion: A supplier delivers contaminated raw material. As the COO, do you:
evaluacion.exampleOptionA: A) Stop the production line immediately and notify the quality team
evaluacion.exampleOptionB: B) Quarantine the batch and switch to backup supplier
evaluacion.exampleOptionC: C) Run quality tests and continue production pending results

credibility.title: Built on recognized frameworks

pillar1.title: SIPOC (Six Sigma)
pillar1.description: Standard framework for process mapping: Suppliers, Inputs, Process, Outputs, Customers. We automate the structure that senior consultants already use.

pillar2.title: BPMN 2.0 (OMG)
pillar2.description: Industry standard notation for business process modeling. Interoperable and exportable diagrams.

pillar3.title: FMEA (Failure Mode Analysis)
pillar3.description: Systematic methodology for identifying and prioritizing risks. We automate the calculation of Severity, Occurrence, Detection, and RPN.

credibility.radarCaption: Risk exposure before and after process implementation with Auditora

liveDemo.title: Test your instincts
liveDemo.subtitle: One decision. Three options. See if you'd align with best practice — most people don't.
liveDemo.scenario: A supplier delivers <danger>contaminated raw material</danger> that passed incoming inspection. As <role>COO</role>, you:
liveDemo.optionA: Stop the production line immediately, quarantine the batch, and notify the quality team
liveDemo.optionB: Quarantine the batch and switch to backup supplier while investigating
liveDemo.optionC: Run quality tests on a sample and continue production pending results
liveDemo.hint: Select the best response based on quality management SOPs
liveDemo.resultExplanation: The correct answer is A — immediate containment. ISO 22000 and most quality management SOPs require halting production upon detection of contamination to prevent further exposure. Option B delays root cause analysis. Option C risks distributing contaminated product.
liveDemo.resultStat: The gap between what people know and what they do under pressure is where operational risk lives. Most teams choose wrong on this scenario.
liveDemo.cta: How would YOUR team respond? Find out.
